title: eupatorium leptocephalum var. typicum
intro: Eupatorium leptocephalum var. typicum, also known as the Flat-topped Boneset, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Eupatorium leptocephalum var. typicum has been valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
